Title: Signup with valid username and password
Preconditions: Apache and MySQL running; database register exists
Steps: 1. Open signup.php 2. Enter valid username 3. Enter valid password 4. Click Signup
ExpectedResult: User is registered and redirected to Signin page
ActualResult: Redirected to Signin page after submit

Title: Signup with empty username
Steps: 1. Keep username empty 2. Enter password 3. Click Signup
ActualResult: Form submission blocked by required validation

Title: Signup with numeric-only username
Steps: 1. Enter username as 12345 2. Enter password 3. Click Signup
ExpectedResult: Alert shown: Please enter valid information
ActualResult: Alert displayed for invalid numeric username

Title: Signin with valid credentials
Preconditions: User already exists in signup table
Steps: 1. Open Signin.php 2. Enter valid username/password 3. Click LOGIN
ActualResult: Login succeeded and Home page opened

Title: Signin with invalid password
Steps: 1. Open Signin.php 2. Enter valid username and wrong password 3. Click LOGIN
ExpectedResult: Alert shown: Invalid email or password

Title: Signin with empty fields
Steps: 1. Leave username and password empty 2. Click LOGIN
ActualResult: Form blocked by browser field validation

Title: Home page loads successfully
Preconditions: User signed in or direct access allowed
ExpectedResult: Navbar, menu cards and sections render without PHP errors
ActualResult: Home page loaded with sections visible and no PHP error output

Title: Menu section navigation from navbar
ActualResult: Menu section opened and category area visible

Title: Review images display
ExpectedResult: All three testimonial images are visible
ActualResult: Three review profile images visible in reviews block

Title: Add item to cart updates count
Steps: 1. Open any menu category 2. Add one item to cart
ActualResult: Cart count changed to 1 after adding item

Title: Cart modal opens
ExpectedResult: Cart modal opens with selected items area
ActualResult: Cart modal opened with selected item details

Title: Database connection success path
ActualResult: Signin page loaded normally with DB running

Title: Database down error handling
ActualResult: Fatal database connection error shown instead of custom connection failed message
